calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA ROSE CONSTRUCTION'S Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds.
APPEARANCES: Brendan P. Brewer, Esq. of Law Office of Brendan P. Brewer 492-0590 for petitioner & moving party; Jeffrey S. Conner, Esq. of Conner & Associates 357-1401 for respondent Shamrock Structures, Inc.; Sheryl L. Bregman, Deputy City Atty 554-4226 for deft City And County Of San Francisco.
RULING: Argued and the Court passed the matter. After Court conferred with counsel off the record, the Court adopted its tentative ruling - The Stop is valid but the Court lacks the authority to direct the City to release funds given the other claims. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Continued To Dec-05-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA ROSE CONSTRUCTION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds.
APPEARANCES: Brendan P. Brewer, Esq. of Law Office of Brendan P. Brewer 492-0590 for petitioner & moving party; Jeffrey S. Conner, Esq. of Conner & Associates 357-1401 for respondent Shamrock Structures, Inc.; Sheryl L. Bregman, Deputy City Atty 554-4226 for deft City And County Of San Francisco.
RULING: The Court adopted the following tentative ruling, which was issued prior to the hearing:
The Court intends to hold a further hearing on December 5, 2008 to address the following matters:
1. The parties are to submit courtesy copies of all pleadings filed to date in this case by December 3, 2008.
2. The parties are to address how the Court is to construe the conflicting documents exchanged between the parties, some of which refer to Shamrock Structures and others refer to Shamrock Structures, Inc. Are some of the documents more persuasive than others? What support is there or is there not that Petitioner erroneously inserted "Inc." on the contracting document?
3. The parties are to address the public policy issues discussed in Great Western Contractors, Inc. v. WSS Industrial Construction, Inc. (2008) 162 Cal.App.4th 581 and Opp v. St. Paul Fire & Marine Ins. Co. (2007) 154 Cal.App.4th 71 relating to the use of "Inc." when contracting.
4. The parties are to address the City's position on the release of funds.
In addition, parties to submit their supplemental briefs simultaneously, also on 12/3/08. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Continued To Nov-19-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISES, INC'S PETITION TO DETERMINE RIGHTS TO WITHHELD FUNDS is continued to November 19, 2008 per ex parte order and stipulation of the parties. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
